content.en:
Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

The Vast Sea Ancestor returned to this familiar palace, sitting on the throne of the Heavenly Emperor, his eyes patrolling the palace masters below.

"Dragon Shadow, let's talk about it, this forbidden realm is called the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, right, what is its current situation, could it be that our Heavenly Emperor Palace has not ruled everything?"

Haohai Ancestor asked.

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord hurriedly said: "The situation of our Heavenly Emperor Palace is a little bad, the strength of Black Wind Mountain is stronger than our Heavenly Emperor Palace, especially Black Wind Mountain has recruited a native in this Xuan Xuan Realm, this native's talent is too demonic, his name is Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, the level of the Ten Thousand Realms can sweep us, our entire Heavenly Emperor Palace is not his opponent, if he hadn't made a move against us, otherwise our Heavenly Emperor Palace would have been destroyed a long time ago!

"Kill Yu Zu, aren't you kidding?"

Haohai Ancestor was a little unconvinced.

"It's true, Lord Heavenly Emperor!" the Dragon Shadow Palace Master said, "The Xuanxu Forbidden Realm now has a Holy Relic War Realm Tower Projection, which can contact the Dark Sacred Domain, and we can reach the Dark Sacred Realm, and we can reach the Dark Sacred Realm's cultivators. The Dark Sanctuary divides the realm of oneness into one realm and returns one realm to nine realms. According to our calculations, the eightfold return to one realm is equivalent to the weaker domain ancestor in the realm, the ninefold return to one realm is afraid that it is comparable to the best in the ordinary domain ancestor level, and there are also over-limit people above the nine-fold one-fold one realm, the first over-limit represents the domain ancestor who can kill the dark holy domain, and the double over-limit represents the weaker elite domain ancestor who can kill the dark holy domain. And the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor is a double overlimiter, able to kill the elite domain ancestor of the Dark Sacred Domain, if it is replaced by the elite domain ancestor of the realm, he is afraid that he can easily kill it. Moreover, he joined the Battle Gate, one of the ten holy gates of the Dark Sacred Domain, which is one of the ten most powerful holy gates in the Dark Sacred Domain, with a large number of Supreme Domain Ancestors and Invincible Domain Ancestors, and even Supreme Domain Ancestors. This is the news we got from the War Tower, and it's confirmed!"

"How is this possible?"

The Mighty Sea Ancestor was taken aback.

Returning to the One Realm to kill the Elite Domain Ancestor, what are you kidding?

So, does the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor Ye Tian have the strength to kill him?

But he knew very well that the Dragon Shadow Palace Master would not dare to deceive him, so many of what they said might be true.

Subsequently, the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord talked about the other situations in the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, and let the Vast Sea Ancestor understand the situation in the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm.

I have to say that today's Xuanxu Forbidden Realm is dominated by Black Wind Mountain and the Human Race, and other forces have no way to compete at all.

In addition, there was also a Ling Tian Domain Ancestor in the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, but it was only an ordinary Domain Ancestor, and there was no threat to the Vast Sea Ancestor.

"Heavenly Emperor, we also found the Cold Moon Palace Lord, she has not fallen!"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord reported.

"You didn't take her?"

Hao Hai Ancestor asked.

In his eyes, the Cold Moon Palace Lord was a weak half-step domain ancestor with no potential, and once the Heavenly Emperor Palace discovered her traces, it should be easy to capture her.

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord hurriedly explained: "Lord Heavenly Emperor, we originally wanted to capture the Cold Moon Palace Lord, but we were destroyed by the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor, she is a friend of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor, and now she lives in the human realm of the human race, we can't help her!"

"She's a friend of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor?"

Haohai Ancestor's brows furrowed.

This is troublesome, if Ye Tian is there, he won't dare to do it!

In case, Ye Tian really had the strength to kill him, then wouldn't he be looking for death?

"It seems that I have to wait for that thing to grow up, in that case, my strength will increase by leaps and bounds, not to mention the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors, even those top domain ancestors in the Divine Heaven Realm, I won't take it seriously!"

The Mighty Sea Ancestor muttered.

"During this time, don't reveal the news of my return, and try not to go out, we must wait for the opportunity!"

The Mighty Sea Ancestor ordered.

"Heavenly Emperor, do we have to wait for that treasure?"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord said in a low voice.

"Dragon Shadow, the Thunder Tribulation stays, and the others retreat!"

The Mighty Sea Ancestor ordered.

The other palace masters retreated one by one, leaving only the Vast Sea Ancestor, the Dragon Shadow Palace Master, and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master.

At this time, Haohai Ancestor spoke: "Yes, I am waiting for those treasures to grow?"

"Lord Heavenly Emperor, what is that treasure?"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord said curiously.

The Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord also expressed curiosity, they had been planning for so long, but in fact, they couldn't find that treasure at all, and they didn't know what it was.

I only knew that it could promote the birth of the forbidden world, but I was never aware of the existence of that thing.

"You really want to know?"

Haohai Ancestor asked.

"I want to know!"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master nodded one after another.

"Well, you two are my most loyal subordinates, and it doesn't hurt to tell you, anyway, I can't hide it for long!" "You should know that I once entered the Dark Forbidden Domain, looking for opportunities, and by accident, I met a powerful existence in the Land of Inheritance, and I went through a lot of hardships to obtain that treasure, and I gave up a inheritance. Even if it is useless to obtain the Inheritance Leaf, and without resources, there is still no way to become the Supreme Domain Ancestor. Those top domain ancestors in the Divine Heaven Realm really don't have the inheritance of the Supreme Domain Ancestors, but they are useless. If you want to become a Supreme Domain Ancestor, the inheritance is useless, otherwise the Dark Sanctuary will be full of Supreme Domain Ancestors. If you want to become a Supreme Domain Ancestor, you must have the talent of defying the sky, or you must have a treasure that defying the sky. And the treasure I obtained will hopefully allow me to step into the Supreme Domain Ancestor level. "

The Ancestor of the Great Sea paused, and then said the name of the treasure.

"That treasure is called—the Void Sacred Tree! it is difficult to grow, and it must be watered once with the promotion energy of a world to make it grow. Moreover, once the Void Divine Tree is planted, it will hide the void, and no one will be able to find its trace unless it is the Supreme Domain Ancestor. What I got was a seed, and a slate, and the seed was placed on the slate. Fusion, I merged with the slate and the seed into the Realm Fragment. Since I planted it myself, I set up a mark, so I can still sense its presence now, but the stone slab seems to have disappeared, and it must have been absorbed by the Void Sacred Tree after it grew. Anyway, it doesn't matter, the Void Sacred Tree is the most important treasure!"

Ancestral Road in the vast sea.

"What is the use of the Void Sacred Tree?"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord asked curiously.

"It can give birth to the Void Holy Fruit, it can change our physique and form the Void Holy Body, and there is no need to cultivate any Holy Body Inheritance!" "The Mighty Sea Ancestor said: "I am not a Holy Body Inheritance, once I refine the Void Holy Fruit, I can directly become the Void Holy Body Inheritor, the Void Holy Body is the thirteenth powerful Holy Body on the Holy Body List." More importantly, once I refined the Void Holy Fruit, my foundation essence changed dramatically, and my potential far exceeded that of what I am now. It's not that non-Eucharists can't become Supreme Domain Ancestors, it's just that it's very difficult, but it's easier for Eucharists to become Holy Communions. Moreover, I am already a domain ancestor, and it is too late to cultivate the holy body inheritance, and I must cultivate the holy body at the half-step domain ancestor level before I can cultivate the holy body. Therefore, the Void Sacred Fruit is my only chance, and it is also a shortcut to the Supreme Domain Ancestor!"

After listening to this, the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master understood.

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord said again: "Don't worry, once I become the Supreme Domain Ancestor, it will not be difficult to get a few sets of Holy Body Inheritance from the Dark Holy Domain at that time, don't be in a hurry to break through to become a Domain Ancestor, and when the time comes, after practicing the Holy Body, I will break through and become a Domain Ancestor, and I am expected to become the Supreme Domain Ancestor in the future." In addition, the Void Sacred Tree is also a treasure tree, on which to comprehend and cultivate, and the cultivation speed is far beyond usual. "

"Thank you, Lord Emperor!"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master said excitedly.

With their level, it is almost hopeless to get the Holy Body Inheritance, and the Mighty Sea Ancestor promised to give them the Holy Body Inheritance, how can they not be excited!
